name: inspector
summary: Right-panel inspector reads selection from Zustand and renders NodeDetail or ConnectorDetail. NodeDetail supports a live config key-value editor with cloud-service dropdowns and field hints.
exposes: Inspector() — renders based on useDiagram selection
Section({ label, children }) — exported from NodeDetail, reused in ConnectorDetail
key_notes: aws-service and google-service nodes render service_name and region fields as <select> dropdowns (not plain inputs).
Config values are auto-coerced: 'true'/'false' → boolean, numeric strings → number.
Service-specific field hints appear after selecting a service_name (e.g. Lambda → runtime/memory/timeout chips).
Hint chips appear for all unreferenced keys in CONFIG_HINTS and AWS_SERVICE_HINTS/GOOGLE_SERVICE_HINTS.
